reviews.review_description: It’s pretty good even tho sometimes the obstacles are thrown higher or away from me. Question: will there be more fighters/opponents and new environments in the future? Seems limited…

I feel like I've tried every rhythm boxing game there is and they all get boring. This one is different. Songs I actually want to dance to, beats that change up often so you don't get bored, and great graphics (for a free game). I want to use this every day but I suspect it's only 3 songs. I would definitely pay to keep this app expanding. I hope this isn't the final product.

reviews.review_title: Great Game but scoring is broke
reviews.review_description:
**Update 9.13
Messaged screen shots to DubFitness and emailed Danny but no response. Scoring is having issues saving which removes the competitive aspect of playing. If there is a better way to contact you in the future pls let me know. 

Previous: 
Best workout game on App Store and I have them all. Devs do a great job at changing it up when it starts to feel a little stale. Almost like a new game every month or so if your brain loves novelty like mine. Devs super responsive to fixes. 

Devs everything working great again. Looking forward to updates. 

Recent update:
Pros: Love 360 movement, axes much more realistic to duck
Cons: Although you nailed tennis ball haptic, least pleasurable when punching hard imo when compared to others used in the past

Keep up the good work. 

____
Previous:
Increased to 5 stars as Devs fixed level saving bug within 48 hours

awesome Game. But settings for color blind would be great. the colors of the balls are difficult to tell apart.
Update: no colorproblems anymore!
Very good game gets the sweat out of you !!!!!!!

I tried an earlier version and there were harder opponents, it had advanced mode that lasted like 7 minutes, I don’t see those in this version, doesn’t feel like it gets harder. I might ask for a refound. Besides that, I like the concept, made me sweat a lot

developer_response.body: An update is coming soon!  Regarding the "advanced mode", you might be referring to Song Mode/Reflex Mode.  In the top bar select Reflex Mode, that will load up songs to choose from.  That mode gets continuously faster the better you do (unlike the opponent mode).

reviews.review_description:
This is a great game. If you want to work up a good sweat! This is my go-to when I don’t have my subscription for Supernatural the updates keep coming, and this is one of my favorites!

One update that you guys can make is a way for us to work more of our legs and lower body. I would love to incorporate a full body workout if possible.
Had this one for awhile, very fun, keeps changing and improving. Unique take on the punch and dodge to music!

reviews.review_title: One of the BEST fitness apps yet!
reviews.review_description: It really doesn't feel like you're having a workout because it's just so freaking fun but this game is LEGIT - you really work up a sweat! The music is great, everything looks awesome and you really get caught up in it. Definitely one of my favourites, it really so well done and even though it's already a complete game and totally polished, the updates keep coming all the time. So excited to see what they do next!

I absolutely love this game.
I've played it for a little while now and a lot of features have been added since I first started playing.
I love how the developers keep improving this game, I find exciting, just when I get to a point where the game is verging on the edge of monotony the developers come in and make improvements to keep me engaged. 
I love the new weapons being launched at me
The 2 ninjas at the start is pretty cool
I like how I can now select different levels and that I can skip the break in between rounds.
I heard some new music as well, would love to be able to run music of YouTube or Spotify etc. 
I like the bears standing at the top of the launch pad indicating which weapons you can expect flying at you. 

The balls coming at you still needs a little tweaking they do start flying way overhead at certain points in the game.  

This is a unique and brilliant fitness game, one that gets you ducking and diving & bobbing and weaving. I am constantly burning of between 300 and 600 calories every day and it is a lot more engaging than some of the other fitness games I have.

developer_response.body:
We just uploaded an updated build.  We have gone back to requiring the player to have to play through a workout in order to open it up for selection.  This only works if the save system works of course, so please let me know if the new version properly saves your progress.  We are going to implement a tutorial system and story mode as you progress through each workout.  Once played it should become selectable from then on.

We are aware the balls fly a little too high sometimes, we expect that to be fixed with the next update.  

Regarding the movement of the thrower, it currently rotates in 170 degrees around the player.  We are building in a modifier system which will allow player to change the rotation amount of the thrower.  That will allow user to tweak it based on their home environment.  That will be coming soon.

2 new songs have been added and a music genre selection among many other tweaks/additions.  Feel free to email me at dannylifted@madreflex.com for any suggestions and/or bug reports or if anything is bugging you about something we added/haven't added.
